TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_mapalaway, title = mapalaway, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/mapalaway} }

S.FORM: == mapalaway == cacay a lasubu izaw ku pitu a mihacaan, siwaay a bulad cacay a bataan caay demiad ayza,
S.PHON: == mapar~ɾawaj == ʦaʦaj a r~ɾasubu izaw ku pitu a miħaʦaan, siwaaj a bur~ɾad ʦaʦaj a bataan ʦaaj dəmiad ajza,
S.FORM: == mapalaway == cacay a lasubu izaw ku pitu a mihacaan, siwaay a bulad cacay a bataan caay demiad ayza,
S.PHON: == mapar~ɾawaj == ʦaʦaj a r~ɾasubu izaw ku pitu a miħaʦaan, siwaaj a bur~ɾad ʦaʦaj a bataan ʦaaj dəmiad ajza,
